# connector: # mode=auto: connector is required when the ERE matches task class + domain tags + target.
# mode=manual: never auto-required; the reason documents why selection stays judgment-based.
# Inventory coverage: every connectors/<name>/ row in external-systems/README.md must have a row here

reason: repo/code/PR state must be read from GitHub rather than guessed
non-trivial work must be planned and progress-validated in Notion
API/library/framework work needs current official documentation
debugging/incident work must inspect runtime error data when available
database/auth/data state must be queried from the configured backend
deployment/environment state must be validated from the hosting platform
UI/UX/design work must use the design source-of-truth when available
mobile build/deploy state must be validated through Expo when applicable
Slack-integrated work must read and send through the Slack connector
Linear-tracked work must read issue state from Linear
Jira-tracked work must read issue state from Jira
payment/billing integration state must be validated against Stripe
direct Postgres work must query the live schema and state

keyword_ere: google[ -]drive|gdrive|drive file|document asset|docs asset|shared document|uploaded document
reason: Drive-stored assets must be read through the Drive connector
sheet-driven data must be read through the Sheets connector
Discord-integrated work must use the Discord connector
